mechanics.excerpt: (In the case of very bad roll, the gamemaster may reveal the result to the charac ter ) The Margin of Success achieved when creating forgery becomes the modifier for any Forgery Action Check made by character attempting to detect the forgery If the original roll failed _ the Margin of Failure becomes negative modifier for any detection rolls Characters attempting torge complex documents items must begin by making an appropriate Art, Career Interest Skill Action Check: Tne Skill required depends on the type of forgery: For example character attempting to forge police report would make Career /Police Officer Skill Check: The roll"= Margin of Success iS used as negative modifier to the Forgery Target Number used to create the forgery: The roll"$ ENGINEERING The Engineering Skill deals with the complex principles of design_ manufacture and modification of equipment: This skill allows character to design equipment from scratch, modify existing designs check for design flaws and determine how design would best be executed Engineering one of the most difficult and time consuming endeavors character can attempt; often requiring an entire staff of engineers and specialized equipment and computer sys tems Something as complex as modifying BattleMech design can take years and is well beyond the scope of this book; the gamemaster allows it, such activities can be pursued between game sessions; but bear in mind the impact the proposed design could have on the campaign.
